gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: clawx Chat
welcome.subtitle: What can I do for you?

changes.heading: File changes ({{count}})
changes.empty: No file changes in this conversation yet
changes.selectFileHint: Click a file card in the chat or “View changes” to open a diff.

preview.emptyHint: Click a file card in the chat first; the selected file will preview here.

errors.outsideSandboxHint: clawx could not read this path. The file may have been moved or deleted, or the current account may not have permission. You can still reveal it in the file manager.
errors.readOnlyRoot: File lives in a read-only location (e.g. bundled skill) and cannot be modified
errors.noPreview: No preview available for this file
errors.unsupportedFormatTitle: This file format is not supported for built-in preview or diff
errors.unsupportedFormatHint: Built-in preview and diff currently support directly readable text/Markdown-style files only. Open the file in the file manager instead.
errors.largeBinaryOpenTitle: This file is too large for built-in preview
errors.largeBinaryOpenHint: This file is {{size}}. clawx cannot preview it inline, but you can confirm and open it with the system default app.

diff.newFile: New file — no original to compare
diff.tooLarge: File too large — diff view disabled, switch to the Source tab to view the full content
diff.unavailable: The current chat did not capture a precise baseline for this file, so no diff is available.
diff.unavailableHint: Use the Preview tab for the current file; use Git or another VCS for an exact diff.

confirmOpen.title: Open file
confirmOpen.message: Open “{{fileName}}” with the system default app?
confirmOpen.detail: This file will be opened with the system default application.

pdf.singlePageHint: Use the toolbar to switch between {{total}} pages

sheet.empty: This file has no displayable worksheets

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.pickFile: Select a file from the left to preview
workspace.truncated: Directory truncated — only the first 5000 entries shown

taskPanel.title: Task Outline
taskPanel.emptyBody: Once a run starts, clawx will surface thinking, tool calls, and handoff states here.

composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another agent
composer.folderDropUnsupported: Couldn't attach this folder. Drag it again, or paste the folder path into your message.
composer.skillPreviewNotFound: Could not find this skill. Open the skill picker to refresh the list.
